hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The snowman should be horizontally centered on the canvas (x = 50)

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The base is the biggest circle and sits near the bottom

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The body sits on top of the base and is smaller

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: The head is the smallest circle and sits on top of the body

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Look at the background image carefully to estimate the y positions and sizes
